planned_changes.description: Add supporting_calculations.csv containing: raw_inputs rows (copied), intermediate_calculations rows with explicit formula expressions and computed numeric columns (net_flow_mw, thermal_margin_mw) for base and sensitivity scenarios, and a sheet-to-file mapping column (e.g., 'raw_inputs!B2').
planned_changes.success_criteria: CSV present at deliverable root; values match actual_outputs.derived_values; formulas/snippets included as text so verifiers can confirm methods.

planned_changes.description: Add final_decision_table sheet in workbook and export final_decision_table.csv with per-segment boolean flags (in_range_voltage, under_thermal_limit), recommendation text, exact source cell citations (raw_inputs!Cx), and reviewer_action column.
planned_changes.success_criteria: CSV present and contains per-segment rows for F1-F3; reviewer_action populated where trace noted 'needs_review'.

planned_changes.description: Populate sensitivity_notes sheet and export sensitivity_notes.csv with at minimum: base, load_plus_10pct, pv_minus_10pct rows and recomputed validation outcomes; summarize whether conclusions change under scenarios.
planned_changes.success_criteria: CSV contains scenario rows, recomputed net_flow and validation booleans; verifier can confirm presence and numeric recomputation.

planned_changes.description: Add next_steps_and_handoff sheet and export next_steps_and_handoff.csv listing any items requiring expert review and the exact verification actions (e.g., 'confirm topology, full power flow study', contact details if applicable).
planned_changes.success_criteria: CSV contains reviewer_action entries and concrete verification steps for any 'needs_review' items.

planned_changes.description: Ensure intermediate_calculations sheet uses live formula cells referencing raw_inputs (for maintainers who open the workbook) and include a text column showing the equivalent formula expression for automated checks.
planned_changes.success_criteria: Workbook contains formula cells and exported supporting_calculations.csv includes matching expressions and computed values.

planned_changes.description: Produce grading_metadata.json that publishes the rubric item weight vector and the explicit aggregation method used to compute final_score (so verifiers can reproduce numeric aggregation).
planned_changes.success_criteria: grading_metadata.json present and the published aggregation reproduces the reported final_score from the rubric_item_scores.

planned_changes.description: Remove duplicated/contradictory grader output sections before publishing or ensure they are exact mirrors; verify passed_criteria and failed_criteria are consistent with rubric_item_scores.
planned_changes.success_criteria: Grader/verifier outputs show consistent pass/fail flags and aggregation metadata.

planned_changes.description: Run a pre-submission self-verification step: confirm CSVs parse in the verification environment (no openpyxl dependency required) and that derived_values in actual_outputs match exported CSV numeric columns.
planned_changes.success_criteria: Automated parse test passes for all exported CSVs; no parse errors.

metadata_json.revision_goal: The baseline attempt produced the required XLSX deliverable and correct numeric derived_values for the base case, but failed verifiability and documentation requirements: sensitivity analysis and exported supporting CSVs are absent, the final decision table and handoff guidance are not verifiable inside the artifact, and the grader outputs contain internal inconsistencies (undocumented score aggregation and contradictory pass flags). These gaps prevented full credit on ri_3, ri_4, and ri_5.
